headline: 1 Dow Jones Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Ignore
summary: The Dow Jones (^DJI) is made up of 30 of the most established and influential companies in the market. But even blue-chip stocks can struggle - some are dealing with slowing growth, outdated business models, or increasing competition.

headline: Honeywell CEO says Iran conflict and AI are boosting demand
summary: Investing.com -- Honeywell International Inc. is seeing increased demand for its products due to the Iran conflict and artificial intelligence growth, Chief Executive Officer Vimal Kapur said Wednesday.

headline: Seagate, SanDisk Stocks Get 2X ETF Boost As Themes Expands Leveraged AI Trade With 9 Funds

headline: PMGC Grabs Precision Parts Maker Serving Boeing, Honeywell
summary: PMGC Holdings shares gained in premarket trading after the company acquired A&B Aerospace in a $4.5 million aerospace manufacturing deal.

headline: Morning Call Sheet: Markets weigh inflation, AI and rate fears
summary: Craig Johnson, Piper Sandler Chief Market Technician, Ross Mayfield, Baird Investment Strategist, and Courtney Gelman, Strategas Washington Research Analyst, discuss inflation risks, Fed policy uncertainty, AI driven markets and rising concerns over concentrated tech exposure.
